comment: P3 verifier calibration (caution.md C-024/C-025/C-029: absence claims on unread or truncated content). The candidate claims an absence (no complaints procedure found) and cites a coverage_proof, but the cited corpus was TRUNCATED (truncated:true), so the absence cannot be honestly proven - a footer disclosure could sit past the cut, exactly as russell-cooke's SRA string sat at char 11,080 past an earlier 4,000-char cap. breach/verifiers/coverage-proof.js must refuse this coverage_proof: verifyCandidate must return verified:false with code coverage_proof_truncated. Run via: node breach/verifiers/quote-match.js --calibrate.
